---
name: Feature request
about: For suggesting new functionality or enhancements to existing features.
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### Feature Description

What new feature would you like to see added?

### Use Case / Benefit

Explain the problem it solves, the user need, or the value it adds.

### Suggested Implementation (optional)

If you have a vision for how this should work technically, describe it here.

### Related Issues / References

Link to other issues or discussions that are relevant.
